# unison-ai-sdk

> TypeScript middleware that gives any [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai) model
> durable, cross-session memory backed by the [Unison brain](https://unisonlabs.ai) —
> recall relevant memories before each call, persist turns after, zero boilerplate.

**Agents: start with [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** — it tells you how to install the
package, authenticate with `UNISON_TOKEN`, and use `wrapLanguageModel` with
`unisonMemory()`.

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): install, quickstart, options, env vars, low-level client
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an agent installs, authenticates, and wires up the middleware
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): build, test, typecheck, PR checklist
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting

## Usage
- Install: `npm i @unisonlabs/ai-sdk ai`
- Auth: `export UNISON_TOKEN=usk_...`
- Wrap: `wrapLanguageModel({ model, middleware: unisonMemory({ sessionId }) })`
- Use the wrapped model anywhere the AI SDK accepts a `LanguageModelV1`

## Examples
- [src/index.ts](src/index.ts): `unisonMemory` middleware implementation
- [src/client.ts](src/client.ts): low-level `recall` and `ingestConversation` functions
- [src/index.test.ts](src/index.test.ts): unit tests
